summary: P0 Auth Loop Bug - FIX APPLIED & VERIFIED on local preview. The root cause was in SupabaseAuthContext.js where bootstrap() set authState=ERROR when no session exists, causing AuthError screen instead of login redirect. Fixed by setting authState=READY when no session, allowing ProtectedRoute's !user && !session check to redirect to login. Note: PRODUCTION (beta.thestrategysquad.com) still shows the bug - requires deployment.

integration_issues.issue: Production site (beta.thestrategysquad.com) still shows auth error. Local preview fix works correctly.

passed_tests: Frontend (LOCAL PREVIEW): Landing page (/) loads without auth error
Frontend (LOCAL PREVIEW): Login page loads with Google & Microsoft OAuth buttons
Frontend (LOCAL PREVIEW): Register page loads correctly
Code Review: AuthCallbackSupabase.js line 120 correctly checks calibrationData.status !== 'COMPLETE'
Code Review: ProtectedRoute.js uses useLocation and checks location.pathname === '/calibration'
action_items: CRITICAL: Deploy the fix to production (beta.thestrategysquad.com) - local preview works but production still broken
The fix in SupabaseAuthContext.js (line 294-306) sets authState=READY when no session, allowing ProtectedRoute to redirect to login
critical_code_review_comments: ROOT CAUSE FOUND & FIXED: SupabaseAuthContext.js bootstrap() was setting authState=ERROR when no session exists (line 294). Changed to authState=READY to allow ProtectedRoute's redirect logic to work.
ProtectedRoute.js correctly uses useLocation for /calibration pathname check
AuthCallbackSupabase.js correctly checks calibrationData.status field (not wrong has_business_profile)
Catch block (line 357-365) correctly defaults to NEEDS_CALIBRATION when session exists but fetch fails
context_for_next_testing_agent: P0 auth loop bug FIXED in local codebase. The fix is in SupabaseAuthContext.js - when no session exists, bootstrap() now sets authState=READY instead of ERROR. This allows ProtectedRoute to check !user && !session and redirect to login. Production site still shows auth error - needs deployment to beta.thestrategysquad.com.

rca_of_the_issue.root_cause: SupabaseAuthContext.js line 294-296 - bootstrap() set authState=ERROR when no session, but ERROR state shows AuthError screen. Unauthenticated users should see login redirect, not error.
reproduction_steps: 1. Visit protected route (/advisor, /calibration, /settings) without being logged in
2. Auth context initializes with no session
3. bootstrap() runs and sees no activeSession
4. Old code: setAuthState(AUTH_STATE.ERROR) - shows 'Authentication error' screen
5. ProtectedRoute checks authState===ERROR before checking !user && !session, so error screen shows
rca_of_the_issue.fix_applied: Changed line 294-306 to set authState=AUTH_STATE.READY when no session. This allows ProtectedRoute to fall through to the !user && !session check (line 29) which redirects to /login-supabase.
rca_of_the_issue.verification: Local preview at calibration-hub-9.preview.emergentagent.com now correctly redirects all protected routes to /login-supabase for unauthenticated users.
